title: aira nitida
intro: Aira nitida, also known as hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira nitida include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
